title: monarda punctata var. occidentalis
intro: Monarda punctata var. occidentalis, also known as the Western Bee Balm or Wild Bergamot, is a fragrant perennial herb native to the eastern and central United States and southern Canada. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Monarda punctata var. occidentalis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat various health conditions, or ingested to promote overall well-being.
